fixes.origin:
os.environ["TASK_VALUE"] = token

cmd = "sh -c 'printf %s \"$TASK_VALUE\"; echo; id'"
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
fixes.replacement:
env = dict(os.environ)
env["TASK_VALUE"] = token
out1 = token + "\n"
p2 = subprocess.run(["id"], shell=False, env=env, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
proc = subprocess.CompletedProcess(args=["env_tool"], returncode=0, stdout=(out1 + p2.stdout), stderr=p2.stderr)
